name: Fungal Gardens
description: Tier upon tier of shallow stone beds support sprawling mats of pale fungus unlike anything found on the surface.
Nestled among them rest curious bulbous creatures whose soft tendrils intertwine with the fungal growth in quiet symbiosis.
Warm mist drifts through the chamber, carrying a sweet, earthy fragrance unlike any forest mushroom.
The entire garden feels less cultivated than carefully maintained.TODO: AI Text
